steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: After claiming the statues are extremely heavy, the passage provides concrete proof. The transition must signal that supporting evidence is coming.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content: ”In fact,” introduces evidence confirming the preceding claim. “Earlier” suggests a time reference, “Instead” implies contrast, and “In any case” concedes unnecessarily. That matches choice A — A is correct.
